title: Pan-Fried Suet Dumplings with Ukrainian Twist
description: A hearty and savory dish combining the richness of suet with the comfort of Ukrainian-style dumplings.
instructions: Combine chopped suet, flour, warm water, chopped bread, dill, salt, and pepper in a large bowl to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth.
Wrap the dough in plastic and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add a small amount of oil to the skillet and cook the dumplings for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve hot with your favorite sauce or soup.
